cases.prompt: set up camoufox
install the stealth browser toolchain
camoufox isn't installed, can you get it working
get my stealth browsing environment ready on this machine
camoufox fetch keeps failing, sort out the install
i need camoufox and the playwright-cli skills installed
bootstrap the anti-detect browser deps
is camoufox set up? if not install it
pip install camoufox and download the firefox binary
prepare the stealth toolchain and install whatever is missing
launch a camoufox browser and open example.com
resume my saved camoufox profile
run camoufox as a websocket server
attach a playwright client to my running browser
check if my browser passes bot detection
why is my camoufox session getting flagged as a bot
install the npm dependencies for this project
set up a postgres database for the app
write a playwright test for the login page
update all my python packages to the latest
set up camoufox
expected_behavior: runs the bundled setup_check.py to detect what is already present before changing anything
installs only the missing pieces (camoufox[geoip] pip package and the camoufox fetch browser binary) — idempotent, no reinstall of what exists
reports the resolved versions and the browser install path
does NOT launch a browser or navigate anywhere

cases.prompt: camoufox fetch failed
expected_behavior: surfaces the actual fetch error (network, proxy, disk space, or permissions) instead of blindly retrying
re-runs python3 -m camoufox fetch and then verifies the binary path exists and is non-empty
reports the resolved browser path on success

cases.prompt: get the stealth environment ready
expected_behavior: detects that camoufox package, browser binary, and playwright-cli skills are already present
makes no changes and reports an idempotent no-op with the current versions
does not error or force a reinstall

cases.prompt: install camoufox and the playwright-cli skills on a machine with no npm
expected_behavior: installs the camoufox package and browser binary (the required components) successfully
reports that playwright-cli could not be installed because npm/Node is missing, with the exact remediation command
clarifies that playwright-cli is a separate general browser-automation layer and is not required to drive Camoufox
exits without falsely claiming the optional playwright-cli step succeeded
